Lead Capture Engine

    
Scan your Turbify inbox, parse lead emails, and push them directly into Odoo CRM.


    
    

      
Inbox Connection — Turbify / Yahoo

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

      

      
      

        Quick setup:
        Yahoo App Password ↗
        Gmail App Password ↗
        Enable Gmail IMAP ↗
        Outlook App Password ↗
      

      

        
        
        

      

    


    
    

      
Lead Specifications


      

        
        
        
        
      


      

        
        

          

            
            
          

          

            
            
          

          

            
            
Controlled by Scan last (days) in the Inbox Connection panel above.

          

          

            
            
          

        


        
        
Email Filters

        
Set at least one filter (Subject or Sender). Leave the dropdown on "— not used —" to skip that filter entirely. The value field is ignored if no type is selected.

        


          
          

            
Subject line

            

              
              
            

            
"contains" matches any subject that includes your text (case-insensitive, Re:/Fwd: ignored)

          


          
          

            
Sender address

            

              
              
            

            
"domain only" matches any sender from that domain. Works with "Name <email>" format.

          


          
          

            
Body text (optional — enable to also search message body)

            

              

                
                
              

              
            

          

        


        
        
AI Extraction

        
Groq will automatically extract name, phone, email, and notes from every matched email. Optionally add a hint to help it understand this template.

        

          
          
        


        

          
          

        

        

      

    


    
    

      
Scan & Import


      
      

      
No specs saved yet — create one in Lead Specifications above.


      

        
        
        
        
        
      


      
      

        

          

          

        

        

          

        

      

      


      
      

        
0 matches — last emails seen in window

        

        
Compare these subjects and senders against your spec filters. Subject filter is case-insensitive substring match.

Review & send your emails

      Nothing is sent automatically. You control every email.

Request Desk

📭 Bounce / Undeliverable Email Manager

          
Upload a .txt or .csv of undeliverable email addresses. Each is matched against Odoo contacts so you can log a note, clear activities, or reschedule follow-ups.

          

            
            
            
          

          

            No emails loaded
            

            
            
            
          

        


        
        

          
Note to log on matched contacts

          
        


        
        


      

    


    
    

      


        

          

            
OEL Command

            
Quick Reference Guide · v10.0

          

          v10.0
        


        
        

          
⚙ Setup & Connection

          

            
Required servers:

            

              python imap_server.py  → port 7843

              python server.py       → port 7842
            

            
Double-click start.bat to launch both and open the app.

            
Settings tab: Enter Odoo URL, database, username, API key, and Groq API key. Use Export/Import credentials to back up and restore all settings, templates, and specs.

            
Groq model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile by default. Change in Settings if hitting rate limits.

          

        


        
        

          
✉ Inbox

          

            
Unified inbox for Turbify/IMAP, Odoo messages, and Gmail. Click any row to expand the body — invisible tracking characters and HTML noise are automatically stripped.

            
✦ Draft — AI reply draft using Groq. 📋 Log — fetches body, opens note modal with live Odoo contact search override. 📅 — schedule activity. 🗑 — move to Trash (IMAP only).

            
Bounce emails: Delivery failures auto-detect the undeliverable address (stripped from email angle-bracket format) and pre-fill the contact search in the log note modal.

            
Templates tab (in Inbox): Removed — Templates now has its own sidebar section.

          

        


        
        

          
⚡ Activities

          

            
Scans your Odoo activities due today and AI-drafts a follow-up email per contact using deal context and last chatter note.

            
Send tab per card: Review & edit (full modal) · ✉ Draft email (Quick Compose pre-filled) · 📋 Log note (posts to Odoo chatter) · Skip.

            
Follow-up Tracker: Shows leads pushed from Lead Capture that have no scheduled activity. Requires Odoo connection — click Check Odoo after connecting in Settings.

          

        


        
        

          
📥 Lead Capture

          

            
Scans IMAP inbox for inbound leads matching your specs. AI extracts contact name, phone, email, and notes.

            
Forwarded emails: Auto-detected (Fwd: subject). AI prompt instructs Groq to extract the real customer from the forwarded body, not the internal forwarder. Card shows ⟳ Forwarded badge.

            
Contact override: In the Review modal, search Odoo contacts by name or email to link the lead to an existing contact instead of creating a new one.

            
Push to Odoo: Creates crm.lead + res.partner + chatter note + follow-up activity in one click.

          

        


        
        

          
📝 Request Desk

          

            
Paste any vague quote request — AI extracts contact info and drafts a TRSAV-style response with clarifying questions (event date, venue, indoor/outdoor, audience size, AV needs, budget).

            
Custom AI prompt: Click "Customize AI response prompt" to edit and save your own prompt. Blank = use TRSAV default. Stored in localStorage.

            
Actions: Send email (Quick Compose) · ⬆ Push to Odoo (creates contact + opportunity + logs draft) · Schedule activity · 📋 Log to contact · Copy.

            
Find in Odoo: Auto-searches Odoo for the contact after extraction. Click "Use" to link to an existing contact.

          

        


        
        

          
🗂 Projects & Tasks

          

            
Projects tab: Card grid of all Odoo projects. Click a project to view its tasks, or + New project to create one.

            
Tasks tab: Filter by project, assignee, stage. Quick-add bar at top (type + Enter). Click Edit on any task for the full edit modal: name, description, stage, priority, assignee, deadline, chatter note, delete. Checkbox moves task to Done stage in Odoo — it is not deleted and can be reopened.

            
To Do tab: Personal tasks with no project. Local first, push any item to Odoo as a personal task with ⬆. Sync with Odoo To Do loads your existing personal Odoo tasks.

            
✦ AI Brainstorm tab: Conversational AI — describe a project or goal, AI asks questions and refines before generating tasks. Only produces TASK: lines when you have enough detail or explicitly ask for a plan. Tasks auto-appear in the Task Summary panel. Buttons below chat: Save as Task · To Do · New project (creates Odoo project with all tasks).

            
Task edit → AI Rewrite: In the edit modal, click Rewrite to get 3 AI-generated alternative task names. Click any to apply.

          

        


        
        

          
💤 Dormant Contacts

          

            
Finds contacts and open opportunities with no scheduled activity and no recent movement. Filters: days inactive, type (customer/supplier/all), rep, exclude tag.

            
Search: Name, company, or internal reference # (Odoo ref field). All Contacts uses stored fields only — computed fields like opportunity_count are filtered in JS after fetch.

            
AI re-engagement draft · Send via IMAP with auto-log · Bulk schedule activity on all selected.

          

        


        
        

          
🏭 Vendor Outreach

          

            
Search Odoo vendors or use 🔍 Find vendors to open YellowPages/Yelp/Google pre-filled. Paste results → AI extracts contacts into cards.

            
Pending section (gold border): extracted vendors not yet in Odoo. ⬆ Push to Odoo per card or Push all. Saved as res.partner with supplier_rank=1.

            
Blast quote request emails to all selected vendors with email addresses.

          

        


        
        

          
📭 Bounce Manager

          

            
Upload .txt or .csv of undeliverable emails, or paste them. Fuzzy-matches against Odoo contacts — exact email first, then local-part matching.

            
Per card: 📋 Log note to chatter · ✕ Clear activities · 📅 Reschedule · Bulk log all matched at once. Custom note template editable at top.

          

        


        
        

          
📋 Templates

          

            
Standalone sidebar section. Left panel: saved template card list. Right panel: editor + AI Composer.

            
Editor: Name, keywords (trigger words for auto-suggest in composers), body with clickable variable insertion ({{customer_name}}, {{subject}}, {{date}}, {{my_name}}, {{sender_email}}).

            
AI Composer: Describe the template purpose + tone → 3 separate Groq calls return name, keywords, and body as plain text (no JSON, no parsing errors). Templates available in Quick Compose, Activities drafts, Dormant Contacts.

            
Build from inbox email: Wizard pulls real inbox emails to build templates from actual conversations.

          

        


        
        

          
📊 Dashboard & Reports

          

            
8 CRM cards + 4 accounting cards. Click any for drill-down. ⚡ Daily AI Briefing summarizes pipeline, wins, due activities, stale deals — Over Achiever mode adds flagged email action items.

            
Quick reports: Aged AR · Top Customers (YTD) · Overdue Notices — all print-ready with Save as PDF.

          

        


        
        

          
🔧 Troubleshooting

          

            
App not updating after deploy: Hard refresh Ctrl+Shift+R. Service worker cache key = oel-v10.0.

            
Odoo calls failing: Confirm server.py is running on port 7842. Check status lights in Settings. All domains must be flat arrays for Odoo 19 — no nested | operators.

            
IMAP not working: Confirm imap_server.py is running on port 7843. Gmail requires an App Password. Turbify uses standard IMAP credentials.

            
AI drafts failing: Check Groq API key in Settings. Verify model name — default is llama-3.3-70b-versatile.

            
Credentials lost: Use Export Credentials to save a JSON backup. Import on any device.

          

        


        

          OEL Command v12.0 · Built by Lazzaro · Powered by Groq AI + Odoo 19

        Credentials loaded from last session
      

          


    
    

      
Connection Mode

      

        

          
🌐 CORS Proxy

          
No setup needed. Uses public proxies with automatic fallback. May be unreliable.

        

        

          
⚡ Local Server

          
Requires Python running in background. 100% reliable, no proxy needed.

        

      

      

        Double-click start.bat in your app folder to start both servers, then click below to verify.
        

          
          

        

      

    


    


    
    

      
Odoo

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
          
Usually the subdomain of your URL

        

      

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
          
Profile → Account Security → API Keys

        

      

    


    


    
    

      

        
AI — Groq

        
required

      

      

        
        
        
Get a free key at console.groq.com/keys — free forever, no credit card needed.

      

      

        
        
        
All models are free. LLaMA 3.3 70B gives the best email quality.

Tradeshow Finder

Tradeshow Floor Plan Scraper

          
Extract exhibitor contacts from any tradeshow exhibitor list

        

        
      


      


        
        

          
          
        


        
        

          

            
            
          

          

            Works on static exhibitor lists. NAB, NAMM, InfoComm, and most tradeshow floor plan sites use JavaScript rendering — if this returns no results, use the Paste Text method instead.
          

          

            🧪 Test with a real live static list:
            IAEE Expo! Expo! 2026 — 100 exhibitors, booth numbers included
            
          

        


        
        


          
          

            

              
⚡ One-click grab — install this bookmarklet

              recommended
            

            

              Drag the button below to your browser's bookmark bar. Then on any exhibitor list page, just click it — the text is sent directly to this scraper automatically. No copy/paste needed.
            

            

              
                
                📋 Grab Exhibitors → OEL
              
              

                ← Drag to bookmark bar

                Then click it on any exhibitor page
              

            

            

              
How it works

              

                1. Drag the button above to your bookmark bar (one time setup)

                2. Navigate to any tradeshow exhibitor list page

                3. Click the bookmarklet — it grabs all visible text

                4. Come back here — content loads automatically ✓
              

            

          


          
          

            
            

              
Bookmarklet data ready!

              

            

            
          


          
          

            
              
                
                Can't use the bookmarklet? Paste manually instead
              
            
            

              On the exhibitor list page:

              Click anywhere on the list → Ctrl+A → Ctrl+C → paste below

              Or press Ctrl+U for page source → Ctrl+A → Ctrl+C → paste below
            

            
            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        


        
        

          

            
Content loaded — preview

            

          

          

        


        
        

          
AI extraction settings

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          

          

            

              
              

                
                
                
                
                
                
              

            

            

              
              
              
Each pass extracts ~250. Auto-continues between passes.
